option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package com.vohuy.mixueapp.utils
/** * Sealed class Result - Wrapper class cho async operations * Giúp xử lý kết quả: Success, Error, Loading * DRY Principle: Tránh kiểm tra null ở nhiều nơi */ sealed class Result<T> { data class Success<T>(val data: T) : Result<T>() data class Error<T>(val exception: Exception) : Result<T>() data class Loading<T> : Result<T>() }

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvItemCount" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Số lượng: 0 sản phẩm" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnClearCart" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Xóa tất cả" />
</LinearLayout>
<RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvCart" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalPrice" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tổng tiền: 0 ₫" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@android:color/holo_red_light" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCheckout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="Thanh Toán" android:textSize="16sp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnContinueShopping" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="Tiếp tục mua sắm" android:textSize="16sp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvItemCount" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Số lượng: 0 sản phẩm" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnClearCart" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Xóa tất cả" />
</LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvCart" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalPrice" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tổng tiền: 0 ₫" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@android:color/holo_red_light" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCheckout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="Thanh Toán" android:textSize="16sp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnContinueShopping" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="Tiếp tục mua sắm" android:textSize="16sp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="8dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCategory1" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Kem" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCategory2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Trà Sữa" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCategory3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Nước" />
</LinearLayout>
<RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvProducts" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="8dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCategory1" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Kem" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCategory2" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Trà Sữa" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnCategory3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Nước" />
</LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvProducts" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>
